channel.title: Shrine of the Black Madonna
channel.description: Upcoming events for Shrine of the Black Madonna

item.title: THE BUY BLACK MARKET PLACE JULY 11,2026 - 11 AM- 4 PM
item.description:
Saturday, July 11, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: Shrine of The Black Madonna Cultural and Event Center, 5309 Martin Luther King Boulevard, Houston, TX, 77021

The Shrine Celebrates the Community with a Day of Food, Music,

Event details
